narrative:
Guilford TWP township has 4,306 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.5 percentage points.
